chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Misc. Application No. 185 of 2020 __________________________________________________________________ Date order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of MA No.4737/2020 08.12.2020 Mr. Noor Ahmed Memon, Advocate for applicants. M/s. Azizur Rehman Mirani & Azizullah Mirani, Advocates for respondent No.1. Mr. Talib Ali Memon, APG a/w PI Mir Muhammad Abbasi, SHO of P.S. Garho, District Thatta. =========== Omar Sial, J: Shah Nawaz has impugned an order dated 9-5-2020 passed by the learned Sessions Judge, Thatta. In terms of the said order the learned judge had ordered the SHO Garho to record the statement of Allah Dino Sholani (respondent No.1) and if a cognizable offence was made out then register an F.I.R. otherwise proceed against Sholani under section 182 P.P.C. 2. Learned counsel for the applicants, it appears, had not read the order attentively, and thus argued that the learned judge has ordered that an FIR be mandatorily registered. A read of the order reflects that no such directions for mandatorily registering an FIR were given. Learned counsel has failed to point out any defect with the impugned order. 3. This Criminal Misc. Application is dismissed along with listed application. JUDGE
